```{=html}
<div class="swtbl-outer">
 <div class="swtbl-header">
  <div class="swtbl-header-cell">Software</div>
  <div class="swtbl-header-cell">Description</div>
 </div>

 <div class="swtbl-row">
  <div class="swtbl-software">
   <a class="swtbl-software-link" href="https://positron.posit.co" target="_blank" rel="noopener">
    <span class="swtbl-software-icon">
     <img src="images/software/positron-icon.png" alt="Positron" />
    </span>
    <span class="swtbl-software-name">Positron</span>
   </a>
  </div>
  <div class="swtbl-desc"><div>Data-science IDE built on VS Code, with side-by-side source and rendered output.</div></div>
 </div>

 <div class="swtbl-row">
  <div class="swtbl-software">
   <a class="swtbl-software-link" href="https://www.r-project.org" target="_blank" rel="noopener">
    <span class="swtbl-software-icon">
     <img src="images/software/r-icon.svg" alt="R" />
    </span>
    <span class="swtbl-software-name">R</span>
   </a>
  </div>
  <div class="swtbl-desc"><div>The statistical programming language we use for the hands-on data work.</div></div>
 </div>

 <div class="swtbl-row">
  <div class="swtbl-software">
   <a class="swtbl-software-link" href="https://spokenly.app" target="_blank" rel="noopener">
    <span class="swtbl-software-icon">
     <img src="images/software/spokenly-logo.png" alt="Spokenly" />
    </span>
    <span class="swtbl-software-name">Spokenly</span>
   </a>
  </div>
  <div class="swtbl-desc"><div>AI powered voice-to-text application.</div></div>
 </div>

 <div class="swtbl-row swtbl-subrow">
  <div class="swtbl-software">
   <span class="swtbl-subrow-elbow" aria-hidden="true"></span>
   <a class="swtbl-software-link" href="https://github.com/matthartman/ghost-pepper" target="_blank" rel="noopener">
    <span class="swtbl-software-icon">
     <img src="images/software/ghost-pepper-icon.png" alt="Ghost Pepper" />
    </span>
    <span class="swtbl-software-name">Ghost Pepper</span>
   </a>
  </div>
  <div class="swtbl-desc"><div>Free, open source replacement for Spokenly.</div></div>
 </div>

 <div class="swtbl-row">
  <div class="swtbl-software">
   <a class="swtbl-software-link" href="https://github.com/apps/desktop" target="_blank" rel="noopener">
    <span class="swtbl-software-icon">
     <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="#181717" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" aria-label="GitHub"><path d="M12 .297c-6.63 0-12 5.373-12 12 0 5.303 3.438 9.8 8.205 11.385.6.113.82-.258.82-.577 0-.285-.01-1.04-.015-2.04-3.338.724-4.042-1.61-4.042-1.61C4.422 18.07 3.633 17.7 3.633 17.7c-1.087-.744.084-.729.084-.729 1.205.084 1.838 1.236 1.838 1.236 1.07 1.835 2.809 1.305 3.495.998.108-.776.417-1.305.76-1.605-2.665-.3-5.466-1.332-5.466-5.93 0-1.31.465-2.38 1.235-3.22-.135-.303-.54-1.523.105-3.176 0 0 1.005-.322 3.3 1.23.96-.267 1.98-.399 3-.405 1.02.006 2.04.138 3 .405 2.28-1.552 3.285-1.23 3.285-1.23.645 1.653.24 2.873.12 3.176.765.84 1.23 1.91 1.23 3.22 0 4.61-2.805 5.625-5.475 5.92.42.36.81 1.096.81 2.22 0 1.606-.015 2.896-.015 3.286 0 .315.21.69.825.57C20.565 22.092 24 17.592 24 12.297c0-6.627-5.373-12-12-12"/></svg>
    </span>
    <span class="swtbl-software-name">GitHub Desktop</span>
   </a>
  </div>
  <div class="swtbl-desc"><div>GUI client for Git, with visual diffs, branch management, and one-click commits.</div></div>
 </div>

 <div class="swtbl-row">
  <div class="swtbl-software">
   <a class="swtbl-software-link" href="https://quarto.org" target="_blank" rel="noopener">
    <span class="swtbl-software-icon">
     <img src="images/software/quarto-icon.svg" alt="Quarto" />
    </span>
    <span class="swtbl-software-name">Quarto</span>
   </a>
  </div>
  <div class="swtbl-desc"><div>Publication platform supporting 4 inputs (Markdown / Code / HTML / YAML), 4 languages (R / Python / Julia / Observable), and 4 outputs (HTML / PDF / slides / Word).</div></div>
 </div>

 <div class="swtbl-row">
  <div class="swtbl-software">
   <a class="swtbl-software-link" href="https://obsidian.md" target="_blank" rel="noopener">
    <span class="swtbl-software-icon">
     <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="#7C3AED" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" aria-label="Obsidian"><path d="M19.355 18.538a68.967 68.959 0 0 0 1.858-2.954.81.81 0 0 0-.062-.9c-.516-.685-1.504-2.075-2.042-3.362-.553-1.321-.636-3.375-.64-4.377a1.707 1.707 0 0 0-.358-1.05l-3.198-4.064a3.744 3.744 0 0 1-.076.543c-.106.503-.307 1.004-.536 1.5-.134.29-.29.6-.446.914l-.31.626c-.516 1.068-.997 2.227-1.132 3.59-.124 1.26.046 2.73.815 4.481.128.011.257.025.386.044a6.363 6.363 0 0 1 3.326 1.505c.916.79 1.744 1.922 2.415 3.5zM8.199 22.569c.073.012.146.02.22.02.78.024 2.095.092 3.16.29.87.16 2.593.64 4.01 1.055 1.083.316 2.198-.548 2.355-1.664.114-.814.33-1.735.725-2.58l-.01.005c-.67-1.87-1.522-3.078-2.416-3.849a5.295 5.295 0 0 0-2.778-1.257c-1.54-.216-2.952.19-3.84.45.532 2.218.368 4.829-1.425 7.531zM5.533 9.938c-.023.1-.056.197-.098.29L2.82 16.059a1.602 1.602 0 0 0 .313 1.772l4.116 4.24c2.103-3.101 1.796-6.02.836-8.3-.728-1.73-1.832-3.081-2.55-3.831zM9.32 14.01c.615-.183 1.606-.465 2.745-.534-.683-1.725-.848-3.233-.716-4.577.154-1.552.7-2.847 1.235-3.95.113-.235.223-.454.328-.664.149-.297.288-.577.419-.86.217-.47.379-.885.46-1.27.08-.38.08-.72-.014-1.043-.095-.325-.297-.675-.68-1.06a1.6 1.6 0 0 0-1.475.36l-4.95 4.452a1.602 1.602 0 0 0-.513.952l-.427 2.83c.672.59 2.328 2.316 3.335 4.711.09.21.175.43.253.653z"/></svg>
    </span>
    <span class="swtbl-software-name">Obsidian</span>
   </a>
  </div>
  <div class="swtbl-desc"><div>Markdown notes on disk, fully AI-workable.</div></div>
 </div>

 <div class="swtbl-row">
  <div class="swtbl-software">
   <a class="swtbl-software-link" href="https://github.com/tw93/Kaku" target="_blank" rel="noopener">
    <span class="swtbl-software-icon">
     <img src="images/software/kaku-logo.png" alt="Kaku" />
    </span>
    <span class="swtbl-software-name">Kaku</span>
   </a>
  </div>
  <div class="swtbl-desc"><div>Polished macOS terminal with built-in file tree, AI, and pane splits.</div></div>
 </div>
</div>
```
